input.command: python -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile(r'D:\windsurf_assistant\resources\app.asar'); names = z.namelist(); print('Total files:', len(names)); print('---TOP LEVEL---'); top = set(); [top.add(n.split('/')[0] if '/' in n else n) for n in names]; print('\n'.join(sorted(top)[:60]))"
